mapper.sql: id, config_key, config_value, description, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT config_value FROM sys_config WHERE config_key = #{configKey}
SELECT FROM sys_config ORDER BY config_key ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_config (config_key, config_value, description, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{configKey}, #{configValue}, #{description}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_config SET config_value = #{configValue}, update_time = NOW() WHERE config_key = #{configKey}
